requirements.summary: Fix WelcomePopup component display issues including text clipping, centering, font sizing, and gold accent styling to ensure proper full-screen rendering with luxury design consistency
acceptanceCriteria: The WelcomePopup renders full-screen without any content clipping or overflow issues
The 'Welcome to Luminia Group' heading is fully visible, centered, and uses the correct Cormorant Garamond display font
Gold accent styling (decorative corner accents, dividers, etc.) is correctly rendered
The dismiss button is clearly visible and accessible
The popup animates in/out smoothly on first session load (via sessionStorage guard)
The popup is responsive and displays correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports

file_operations.description: Fix the WelcomePopup component layout and styling to resolve content clipping and overflow issues. Ensure the heading uses proper Cormorant Garamond display font with fluid clamp-based sizing (text-5xl to text-7xl). Adjust container padding and max-width to prevent text overflow. Verify gold accent styling (border colors, corner decorations, dividers) uses the luxury gold tokens. Ensure the dismiss button is clearly visible with proper z-index and positioning. Maintain the sessionStorage-based show-once behavior and smooth entrance/exit animations. Ensure responsive layout works correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports with appropriate padding and spacing.
